why.founderStory: I was depressed. Nothing was working. I applied these rules — my own voice, repetition, language aligned with how the subconscious works — and it changed my life. I built waQup so others can have the same access.
why.rulesTitle: The rules that make it work — backed by scientific perspectives. Full details on The Science:
why.ruleRepetition: Repetition: Daily practice rewires the brain.
why.rulePositive: Positive framing: The subconscious doesn't process "no." "No smoking" → weak. "I choose vitality" → constructive, aligned.
why.rulePresent: Present tense: "I am confident" not "I will be."
why.ruleBelievable: Believable, gradual: Avoid grandiose claims that trigger rejection.
why.ruleOwnVoice: Own voice: Your brain encodes your voice 30–40% more strongly than strangers'.
why.identityShift: All of this — aligned. Identity shift is the outcome. Not scientifically proven, but backed by research.

intention.headline: What matters most to you right now?
intention.subhead: Clarity of intention activates the prefrontal cortex — the part of your brain responsible for planning and change.
intention.skip: Skip — go straight to the orb →

voice.headline: Your voice for your affirmations
voice.subhead: Your brain trusts your own voice more. (One of the rules.)
voice.optionFree: Use your own voice for free: Record directly when creating — no clone, no extra cost. Just base creation credits. Best for getting started.
voice.optionClone: Clone your voice: One-time cost (50 Q) to create your clone. When you use it for AI-voiced content, cost per creation depends on script length — longer scripts = more Qs.
voice.costNote: Own recording = free. Clone = 50 Q one-time + per-creation cost by length.
voice.audioHint: Upload one or more recordings (MP3, WAV, M4A). 30+ seconds total recommended.
voice.processingMessage: Your voice is being created. You can continue and use it once ready.

profile.title: What should we call you?
profile.subtitle: We'll use this when we speak to you in your rituals. You can change it anytime.
profile.applicationsTitle: Where does this apply? waQup works for:
profile.applicationsNote: Personal practice, teaching, coaching, creating, or running a space — same tools, your voice, your intention.

preferences.title: What brings you here?
preferences.subtitle: Choose the areas you most want to transform. You can update these anytime.

guide.title: Create your first practice now
guide.subtitle: Here's how waQup works
guide.learningTeaser: As you practice and level up, more learning content unlocks — deeper science, advanced techniques, level-specific insights. Visit Learn in Sanctuary.
guide.communityBlock: Join others on the path — when we each shift, we shape what's possible.

create.title: Create
create.description: Build personalized affirmations, meditations, or rituals through a guided conversation.

listen.title: Listen
listen.description: Hear your own voice — the most powerful form of identity encoding.

transform.title: Transform
transform.description: Consistent practice rewires your subconscious patterns over time.
